title: Clock gated signals not synchronised if used as a logical input

features.name: clock_gating_and_enable
features.description: Code should include an AND-based clock gating construct where a clock signal is combined with an enable signal using the & operator to generate a gated clock.

features.name: gated_clock_as_combinational_input
features.description: Code should include a gated clock signal being used as a data/logical input to combinational logic rather than solely as a clock in an edge-sensitive always block.

features.name: clock_synchronization_in_logic
features.description: Code should include a pattern where a synchronized clock signal feeds into non-clock logic operations, creating potential synchronization boundary issues in simulation.
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) clk2 <= clk; assign out = clk2 & data;
